caption:
Summary

In this discussion with Manufacturer’s Hub, Danny Grigg shares a direct view on the current state of UK manufacturing and the wider business landscape. He covers the real pressures facing the sector — rising costs, labour shortages, and the ongoing challenge of scaling efficiently — while also highlighting where opportunity still exists for companies willing to adapt.

Drawing on hands-on experience from the shop floor through to full system delivery, Danny explains why UK manufacturing still has a competitive edge: speed, engineering quality, and the ability to deliver complete solutions in-house. The conversation focuses on cutting through outdated approaches, adopting smarter automation, and building businesses that are resilient, scalable, and commercially sharp.

The key message is simple: the UK isn’t short on capability — it’s short on businesses willing to move fast enough to take advantage of it.
